didNotMakePlayoffs: The {{teamName}} didn't make the playoffs. Better luck next year!
appSubtitle: Craft your legacy. Become a legend.
playerBioDescription: This will be used by the AI to generate a unique story for your player.
playerBioPlaceholder: Describe your player's backstory, personality, and motivations. e.g., 'A quiet kid from a small town with a chip on his shoulder, known for his relentless work ethic and calm demeanor under pressure.' The more detail, the more unique your career will be.
clutchTraitDescription: Perform better in high-pressure situations. Costs 5 attribute points.

draft.title: NBA Draft Night
draft.selectedBy: With the following selection, the {{teamName}} select...

preDraft.title: Pre-Draft Process
preDraft.makeChoice: Complete the showcase games and media interviews to improve your draft projection.
preDraft.gamesDesc: Play 3 games to prove your skills.
preDraft.interviewDesc: Answer tough questions from the press.
preDraft.question: Question {{num}} of {{total}}

eventLoading.title: Pivotal Moment
eventLoading.description: A key event in your career is unfolding...

noNews: The wire is quiet for now...

settingsModal.title: Settings
settingsModal.apiKeyDescription: By default, this app uses a shared API key that has rate limits. To use your own Google AI API key for unlimited use, paste it below. Your key will be saved in your browser.
settingsModal.getYourKey: Get your own key at Google AI Studio

improving.title: Chemistry Improving
improving.description: The team dynamic is feeling strong! Current chemistry: {{value}}.

worsening.title: Chemistry Worsening
worsening.description: Tension is building in the locker room. Current chemistry: {{value}}.

traitGained.title: Trait Gained!
traitGained.description: You've earned the '{{traitName}}' trait through your actions!

social.title: HoopsNet
social.noTweets: Your feed is empty. Play a game to see what people are saying!

playoffs.title: NBA Playoffs
playoffs.wonChampionship: You have won the NBA Championship!
playoffs.challenge: The {{teamName}} stand in your way. It's time to choose your game plan.
playoffs.seriesComplete: Their series is still being decided.

scouting.title: Scouting Report
scouting.dominant_big: This team runs its offense through a dominant post presence. They are tough inside but can be slow to defend the perimeter.
scouting.offensive_juggernaut: An offensive powerhouse with multiple scoring threats. They play fast and can put up points in a hurry.
scouting.defensive_lockdown: A gritty, defensive-minded team that will make you work for every point. They thrive on low-scoring affairs.
scouting.pace_and_space: This team loves to run and shoot threes. They spread the floor with shooters and attack relentlessly in transition.

playoffChoice.title: Game Plan
playoffChoice.subtitle: How will you approach this crucial playoff game?

iso_hero_ball.name: Hero Ball
iso_hero_ball.description: Isolate your matchup and take over the scoring. High risk, high reward.

three_point_barrage.name: 3-Point Barrage
three_point_barrage.description: Hunt for open shots from beyond the arc. Live and die by the three.

fastbreak_frenzy.name: Fastbreak Frenzy
fastbreak_frenzy.description: Push the pace relentlessly. Look to score in transition before the defense can get set.

pick_and_roll_mastery.name: Pick & Roll Mastery
pick_and_roll_mastery.description: Run the pick and roll to create shots for yourself or teammates.

attack_the_paint.name: Attack the Paint
attack_the_paint.description: Be aggressive and drive to the basket, trying to draw fouls or score at the rim.

mid_range_clinic.name: Mid-Range Clinic
mid_range_clinic.description: Exploit the defense by focusing on high-percentage mid-range jumpers.

patient_offense.name: Patient Offense
patient_offense.description: Move the ball and wait for the best possible shot to open up.

post_up_bully.name: Post-Up Bully
post_up_bully.description: Use your size and strength to back down defenders in the post for easy looks.

unleash_creative_playmaking.name: Unleash Creativity
unleash_creative_playmaking.description: Improvise and make flashy plays to catch the defense off guard.

full_court_press.name: Full Court Press
full_court_press.description: Apply pressure the entire length of the court to force turnovers.

pack_the_paint.name: Pack the Paint
pack_the_paint.description: Collapse the defense to prevent inside scoring, but risk leaving shooters open.

run_shooters_off_line.name: Run Shooters Off the Line
run_shooters_off_line.description: Aggressively close out on perimeter players to prevent 3-point attempts.

force_tough_midrange.name: Force Tough Mid-Range
force_tough_midrange.description: A conservative scheme designed to prevent layups and open threes.

lock_down_star_player.name: Lock Down Star Player
lock_down_star_player.description: Focus your best defender on stopping the opponent's main threat.

switch_everything.name: Switch Everything
switch_everything.description: Switch all screens to disrupt offensive flow, but risk creating mismatches.

trap_the_ball_handler.name: Trap the Ball Handler
trap_the_ball_handler.description: Send a double-team at the primary ball handler to force a mistake.

physical_defense.name: Physical Defense
physical_defense.description: Use your strength to be disruptive, but risk getting into foul trouble.

secure_defensive_rebounds.name: Secure Defensive Rebounds
secure_defensive_rebounds.description: Prioritize ending defensive possessions by boxing out and grabbing boards.

enforce_the_paint.name: Enforce the Paint
enforce_the_paint.description: Establish a physical presence inside, deterring drives and contesting shots.

slow_the_pace.name: Slow the Pace
slow_the_pace.description: Grind the game to a halt, limiting possessions for both teams.

push_the_pace.name: Push the Pace
push_the_pace.description: Speed up the game, creating more possessions and a chaotic environment.

veteran_leadership.name: Veteran Leadership
veteran_leadership.description: Lean on experienced players to make smart plays and calm the team.

small_ball_lineup.name: Go Small
small_ball_lineup.description: Play a smaller, faster lineup to emphasize speed and shooting.

big_ball_lineup.name: Go Big
big_ball_lineup.description: Play a larger, stronger lineup to dominate the paint and rebounding.

focus_on_ball_movement.name: Focus on Ball Movement
focus_on_ball_movement.description: Emphasize passing and teamwork to generate open looks for everyone.

crash_offensive_glass.name: Crash the Offensive Glass
crash_offensive_glass.description: Send players to get offensive rebounds for second-chance points.

coachs_pep_talk.name: Coach's Pep Talk
coachs_pep_talk.description: A well-timed timeout to regroup and motivate the team.

fan_favorite_play.name: Run a Highlight Play
fan_favorite_play.description: Attempt a high-flying play to energize the team and the home crowd.

trash_talk_opponent.name: Trash Talk
trash_talk_opponent.description: Get in the opponent's head to try and throw them off their game.

study_film_and_exploit.name: Study Film & Exploit
study_film_and_exploit.description: Use your preparation to attack a specific weakness in the opponent's scheme.

rally_the_team.name: Rally the Team
rally_the_team.description: Take on a leadership role, directing teammates and boosting morale.

awardsCeremony.title: Season Awards Ceremony
awardsCeremony.subtitle: Your incredible performance this season has been recognized by the league.
awardsCeremony.noAwardsSubtitle: The 82-game season has concluded. It's time for the post-season.
awardsCeremony.noAwardsBody: You didn't win any major league awards this season. Time to prove them wrong in the playoffs!

offSeasonTraining.title: Off-Season Training
offSeasonTraining.subtitle: Time to hit the gym based on your coach's feedback.
offSeasonTraining.noImprovement: Tough session. No significant improvements this time.

freeAgency.title: Off-Season: Free Agency
freeAgency.subtitle: Your contract is up. Where will you sign for Season {{season}}?

retirementPrompt.title: A Big Decision
retirementPrompt.description: You've just completed your {{season}}th season in the NBA. You have the option to retire now and solidify your legacy, or return for another year to chase greatness. What's your call?

retirement.title: A Legendary Career
retirement.solidCareer: A solid career in the books.

mvp.name: MVP
mvp.description: Most Valuable Player of the Season

fmvp.name: Finals MVP
fmvp.description: Most Valuable Player of the Finals

rookie-year.name: Rookie of the Year
rookie-year.description: Voted best rookie of the season

dpoy.name: Defensive Player of the Year
dpoy.description: Voted best defender of the season

sixth-man.name: Sixth Man of the Year
sixth-man.description: Voted best reserve of the season

most-improved.name: Most Improved Player
most-improved.description: Showed the most progress from the previous season

double-double.name: Double-Double
double-double.description: Achieved a double-double in a game

lottery-pick.name: Lottery Pick!
lottery-pick.description: Selected in the top 14 picks of the draft

playoff-berth.name: Made the Playoffs
playoff-berth.description: Your team qualified for the playoffs

triple-double.name: Triple-Double
triple-double.description: Achieved a triple-double in a game

50-point-game.name: 50-Point Game
50-point-game.description: Scored 50 or more points in a game

jersey-retired.name: Jersey Retired
jersey-retired.description: Had your jersey retired by a team

hall-of-fame.name: Hall of Fame
hall-of-fame.description: Inducted into the Basketball Hall of Fame

legend.name: Legend of the Game
legend.description: Played for more than 15 seasons in the NBA
